channel.title: Bbc-News on Moh le CATALAN MALIEN
channel.description: Recent content in Bbc-News on Moh le CATALAN MALIEN

item.title: Bodies of missing Italian divers found in Maldives
item.description:
Source : BBC News

The bodies of all five Italian divers who died in the Maldives last week have now been found, officials tell the BBC.

Cet article a été généré automatiquement depuis le flux RSS de BBC News.

item.title: Prince William selling 20% of duchy property for housing and nature projects
item.description:
Source : BBC News

The Duchy of Cornwall is to sell part of its 128,000 acre estate and re-invest in more housing.

Cet article a été généré automatiquement depuis le flux RSS de BBC News.
